name: Super Blue Boy Planet
short_description: SBBP is a 2D platformer with pixel graphics. Blue boy’s girlfriend is kidnapped by aliens so he goes through 21 levels to save her and he also fight bosses along the way.
detailed_description:
More Games


About the Game

Super Blue Boy Planet is a charming, quirky platformer that offers a delightful mix of retro-inspired gameplay and colorful pixel graphics. Take control of the brave Blue Boy as he embarks on a mission to save his kidnapped love from alien captors. Navigate through 21 fun-filled levels, jump on enemies, avoid tricky obstacles, and solve puzzles to activate bridges and other objects—all while enjoying a lighthearted adventure.

With simple controls and gamepad support, Super Blue Boy Planet is perfect for players of all skill levels. Whether you're stomping on creepy crawlies or facing off against level bosses, the game's well-paced checkpoints ensure a frustration-free experience.

Key features:

  • Smooth and easy-to-learn controls, with gamepad support recommended

  • Exciting variety of enemies and challenging bosses

  • Puzzle-solving elements that add depth to the gameplay

  • Fun and casual platforming experience with retro flair

  • Playable in short bursts—ideal for quick gaming sessions

Super Blue Boy Planet is free-to-play and packed with engaging platforming action, making it the perfect choice for players seeking a nostalgic yet modern platforming adventure. Dive in today and see if you can rescue Blue Boy's sweetheart!
